reviews.comment:
El minimercado atiende pocas horas y está por lo general desabastecido, la parte de combustible bien, pero con horario reducido

(Translated by Google)
The minimarket is open for a few hours and is generally out of stock. The fuel supply is fine, but the hours are reduced.

reviews.comment:
Poco espacio para maniobras, ingreso en mal estado, buena atencion.

(Translated by Google)
Limited maneuvering space, poor condition of the entrance, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRX01LT1VBEAE

reviews.comment:
Probablemente sea ésta, si no la más, una de las estaciones ACA con las vistas más maravillosas del país. Ameritaría que mejorara la oferta servicios al usuario, además de la esencial (el combustible).

(Translated by Google)
This is probably, if not the most, one of the ACA stations with the most wonderful views in the country. It deserves to improve its customer service offerings, beyond the essential one (fuel).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa0ptTGZREAE
